description_long: This object is a classic chessboard with a flat, square playing surface divided into an 8x8 grid of alternating black and white squares. The board is bordered by a thin, solid black edge that frames the playing area without any visible ornamentation or inscriptions. On the board, there are two sets of round, flat game pieces: one set is black and the other is white, each arranged on their respective sides in a starting position reminiscent of checkers or draughts. The surface appears smooth and hard, likely made from plastic or a similar synthetic material, giving it a slightly glossy finish. The chessboard is compact and portable, suitable for placement on tables or benches in urban parks or recreational areas. The overall design is utilitarian, focusing on clear visual contrast and durability for repeated use.
description: A classic chessboard with an 8x8 grid of alternating black and white squares, bordered by a thin black edge and featuring two sets of round, flat game pieces. The board has a smooth, slightly glossy surface and a simple, functional design.
description_view_0: The chessboard is viewed from the black side, showing the black pieces in the foreground and the white pieces in the background, with the alternating square pattern clearly visible.
description_view_1: The board is rotated to show the white pieces on the right and black pieces on the left, highlighting the symmetry and arrangement of the pieces across the grid.
description_view_2: This view presents the chessboard from the white side, with white pieces in the foreground and black pieces in the background, emphasizing the alternating pattern and the border.
description_view_3: The board is rotated to show the white pieces on the left and black pieces on the right, offering a clear view of the edge and the arrangement of the pieces.
attribute_board_pattern: The playing surface features a regular 8x8 grid of perfectly square tiles, alternating between solid black and solid white squares in a classic checkerboard pattern. The squares are uniform in size and sharply delineated, with no decorative elements or additional markings within the grid.
attribute_border_design: The border is a thin, solid black frame that runs around the entire perimeter of the board, slightly raised above the playing surface. It is plain, without any ornamentation, inscriptions, or decorative markings, and appears to be made of the same plastic material as the board.
